structuralGrowthAllowances.reason: Upstream-owned (garrytan/gbrain) monoliths that grow via coordinated MID-STRUCTURE edits — new DDL in schema.sql, a new migration object inserted mid-MIGRATIONS-array in migrate.ts, and a mirrored block in pglite-schema.ts. These are not prefix-appends, so append-only cannot cover them (the TECH-2031 dogfood escalated on exactly this). Modularizing upstream-owned files would maximize merge-conflict pain on the highest-churn upstream files. File-level acceptance only — function-level monolith findings and every other detector are still enforced.
